'''Seluss''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who smuggled with his partner [[Jarril]] on [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]] when Jarril was killed in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].
He tried shooting [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on [[Skip 1]], assuming that he was responsible for Jarril's disappereance.<ref >''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>

He was named for a [[Seluss|species of serpent]] from his homeworld.<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
